none.justification: Correctly identifies the file-scope trap: driver_nl80211.c only has the forwarding wrapper driver_nl80211_scan2 and the real scan-trigger failure logic is in driver_nl80211_scan.c. It is somewhat overinclusive by listing scheduled-scan/stop-sched-scan paths, but it labels their location and preserves the key distinction required for full credit.

ccodegraph.justification: Fully matches the GT: it states that driver_nl80211_scan2 is the only relevant function in driver_nl80211.c, has no error conditions of its own, and forwards to wpa_driver_nl80211_scan in the separate scan translation unit. It also accurately summarizes the real failure conditions in driver_nl80211_scan.c without misattributing them.

lsp.justification: Correctly reports the wrapper in driver_nl80211.c and explicitly says it has no local error logic, then places the substantive failure paths in driver_nl80211_scan.c. It includes sched_scan as an extra scan path, but the core file-scope limiter and one-shot scan failure conditions are handled correctly.
